injuries.comment: The Minnesota Wild placed F Ryan Hartman on injured reserve on Wednesday (Nov. 19).
The Avalanche announced that Brindley as week-to-week on Saturday (Nov. 22) and will be evaluated in a few weeks, per Evan Rawal of the Denver Gazette.
The Avalanche said on Wednesday (Nov. 12) that Nichushkin will be week-to-week, per Evan Rawal of the Denver Gazette.
